title: ASR Outdoor Portable Collapsible Reusable Camping Travel Water Dispenser Water
description:
If you’re out in the wilderness, access to fresh and safe water is, as we all know, essential! Stay hydrated and prepared with the ASR Outdoor Portable Collapsible Reusable Camping Travel Water Dispenser that gives you ample water storage on your campsite. The water carrier is also ideal for emergency, disaster prep or survival kits due to its compact, foldable and reusable design. The water jug can hold up to 5 gallons (or 20 liters) of water; whether for drinking, cooking, pet water and more the collapsible water carrier will last you for several days

ASR Outdoor Portable Collapsible Reusable Camping Travel Water Dispenser Water

If you’re out in the wilderness, access to fresh and safe water is, as we all know, essential! Stay hydrated and prepared with the ASR Outdoor Portable Collapsible Reusable Camping Travel Water Dispenser that gives you ample water storage on your campsite. The water carrier is also ideal for emergency, disaster prep or survival kits due to its compact, foldable and reusable design.

Key Features

  • FRESH WATER STORAGE: If you’re out in the wilderness, in a hurricane disaster needing access to fresh and safe water this is essential; stay hydrated and prepared with the ASR Outdoor Portable Collapsible Reusable Water Dispenser that gives you ample water storage
  • FULL 5 GALLON CAPACITY: This reusable water jug can hold up to 5 gallons (or 20 liters) of water; whether for drinking, cooking, pet water and more on your campsite, the collapsible water jug will last you for several days; opening is large enough to add ice cubes or alkaline or charcoal water filters if desired
  • EASY TO PACK: When the water dispenser is not in use, whether for storage or during transportation, folds down in a lightweight, easily portable and compact package
  • SPILL PROOF DESIGN: The ASR Outdoor five-gallon water jug features a built-in valve and secure on/off spigot for efficient and high flow water pours
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Open Dimensions: 9 x 12 x 13 inches; Capacity: 5 Gallons/20 Liters; Color: Clear

Product Specifications

  • MPN: AO-RL21-CWC5G
  • UPC: 810058481085
  • Color: clear

The water jug can hold up to 5 gallons (or 20 liters) of water; whether for drinking, cooking, pet water and more the collapsible water carrier will last you for several days. In addition, the cap opening is large enough to add ice cubes, lemon, lime, herbs like rosemary or mint, or small alkaline or charcoal water filters if desired!

When the water dispenser is not in use, whether for storage purposes or during transportation, it quickly folds down into a compact, lightweight and easily portable package. With this, you have a space-saving, easy to pack and great for travel water carrier to use for years to come on camping trips, waterfall or lake-bound hikes, boating adventures and more! On top of the camping water carrier’s excellent portability, the ASR Outdoor five-gallon camping water dispenser has thoughtful and ergonomic design features, such as integrated handles—making it easy to carry and maneuver when full—and a secure on/off spigot for efficient and high flow water pours.

Whether for remote camping trips or boating adventures, keep yourself, family and friends hydrated and with access to fresh water, with the ASR Outdoor Portable Collapsible Reusable Camping Travel Water Dispenser.
